subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! The revered Name of God hath evoked the utmost praise and glorification through fervor, rapture, attraction, longing and spiritual enkindlement [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله حضرت اسم الله نهایت نعت و ستایش از شور و وله و جذب و شوق و اشتعال
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @praise and encouragement, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
